evals.prompt: Haz el análisis estadístico completo de los modelos KDM y NPC. El proyecto está en C:\Users\bspd2\Maestria\Analisis-KDM-PNC. El MLflow está en mlflow.db y los resultados experimentales en resultados/mnist_noise/. Necesito: estadística descriptiva, prueba de normalidad Shapiro-Wilk, prueba de significancia (T-Student o Mann-Whitney), boxplots y violin plots, curvas ROC, heatmap de diferencias entre matrices de confusión, y el archivo statistical_report.md. Guarda todo en experiments/plots/ como PDF y PNG a 300 DPI.
evals.expected_output: Python analysis script saved to experiments/analysis.py, at least 5 figures in experiments/plots/ (PDF+PNG), statistical_report.md with p-value interpretation and model superiority conclusion

assertions.name: analysis_script_created
assertions.description: A Python analysis script (analysis.py or similar) is created in experiments/

assertions.name: figures_saved_as_pdf_and_png
assertions.description: At least one figure is saved in both .pdf and .png format in experiments/plots/

assertions.name: statistical_report_created
assertions.description: statistical_report.md is created and contains statistical test results

assertions.name: report_contains_pvalue
assertions.description: statistical_report.md mentions p-value and interprets statistical significance

assertions.name: report_has_model_conclusion
assertions.description: Report declares which model is superior and under what conditions

evals.prompt: Compara KDM vs NPC en los resultados del experimento mnist_dim_3_min_3_noise_1. Genera boxplots de accuracy, violin plots, y las curvas ROC multi-clase. El proyecto está en C:\Users\bspd2\Maestria\Analisis-KDM-PNC. Recuerda que NPC tuvo pérdida NaN durante el entrenamiento — documenta esto en el reporte. Guarda figuras como PDF y PNG a 300 DPI en experiments/plots/.
evals.expected_output: Boxplot figure, violin plot figure, ROC curve figure (all as PDF+PNG). NaN loss for NPC documented in analysis.

assertions.name: boxplot_generated
assertions.description: A boxplot or bar chart comparing KDM vs NPC accuracy is generated

assertions.name: nan_loss_documented
assertions.description: The analysis code or report explicitly handles or documents NaN loss for NPC

assertions.name: 300_dpi_used
assertions.description: Figures are saved with dpi=300 parameter

assertions.name: both_pdf_and_png
assertions.description: Code saves figures in both .pdf and .png format

evals.prompt: Genera el reporte estadístico final statistical_report.md para mi tesis de maestría comparando KDM (42% accuracy) y NPC (10% accuracy, pérdida NaN) en el dataset mnist_dim_3_min_3_noise_1 (MNIST reducido a 3 dimensiones con PCA y ruido gaussiano sigma=1). Incluye: resumen ejecutivo, tablas de estadística descriptiva, resultados de la prueba de normalidad, resultado de Mann-Whitney U o T-Student con interpretación del p-valor, discusión científica de por qué NPC colapsa en datos PCA-3D, y recomendaciones. Proyecto en C:\Users\bspd2\Maestria\Analisis-KDM-PNC.
evals.expected_output: statistical_report.md with all required sections: executive summary, descriptive stats table, normality test results, significance test with p-value, scientific discussion of NPC collapse on PCA data, recommendations.

assertions.name: report_has_executive_summary
assertions.description: Report includes an executive summary section

assertions.name: report_has_descriptive_stats
assertions.description: Report includes descriptive statistics (mean, std, etc.)

assertions.name: report_has_significance_test
assertions.description: Report includes a statistical significance test (T-test or Mann-Whitney)

assertions.name: report_explains_npc_collapse
assertions.description: Report scientifically explains why NPC produces NaN loss or collapses on PCA-3D data

assertions.name: report_has_recommendations
assertions.description: Report includes a recommendations section for future work
